description: Configure the warehouse for hazardous material storage. Create an internal location named 'Safety Cabinet 01' inside the main Stock location and implement a putaway rule that routes 'Corrosives' category products to this location. Process a receipt for 5 units of 'Sulfuric Acid 98%' from 'Chemical Suppliers Inc' to confirm that the items are automatically routed to 'Safety Cabinet 01' upon validation.
